summary: Tested Open Items (Artículos Libres) report 'Candidatos a producto permanente' conversion feature end-to-end on /reports. All flows verified: candidates section render, modal open, pre-fills, form validation, product creation. Product 'Pasta especial chef' created successfully in backend (verified via GET /api/products).
critical_code_review_comments: OpenItemsReport.jsx default category_id is set to categories[0].id on modal open (line 32). If /api/categories resolves AFTER user opens the convert dialog (race condition), category_id will be empty string forcing user to manually pick. Consider setting default when categories load, or using a placeholder asking user to pick.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created; used existing seeded Open Items for business_date 2026-04-22 ('Pasta especial chef' x4, 'Cocktail del chef' x3).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page loads active business day (2026-04-19) by default, NOT today. Seeded open-items candidates were for 2026-04-22, so the 'Candidatos a producto permanente' section is EMPTY unless the user widens the date range (click 'Esta Semana' preset OR manually set date_to=2026-04-22). Testing agent used 'Esta Semana' preset to expose candidates. The review request mentioned TEST_Pasta especial/TEST_Cocktail chef names but actual seeded candidate names are 'Pasta especial chef' (4 occurrences) and 'Cocktail del chef' (3 occurrences). TEST_* rows shown in table have only 2 occurrences and thus do not appear as candidates.

test_results_detail.candidates_section_renders: PASS (2 candidates after date range widened to 'Esta Semana')
test_results_detail.candidate_0_text: Pasta especial chef · 4 ventas · 4 uds · avg 350 · total 1,400
test_results_detail.candidate_1_text: Cocktail del chef · 3 ventas · 3 uds · avg 250 · total 750
test_results_detail.product_persisted_in_backend: PASS — GET /api/products shows 'Pasta especial chef' price=350.0 active=True category_id set
test_results_detail.regression_combinaciones_top_loads: PASS — no error text on page
test_results_detail.toast_sonner_detected: Not detected in DOM snapshot, but dialog closed and product persisted (likely transient sonner toast disappeared before snapshot). Non-blocking.
